name: GTNH Forge 1.7.10 Dev
postCreateCommand:
mkdir -p ~/.gradle && JAVA_PATHS=$(find /usr/local/sdkman/candidates/java -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d ! -name current | paste -sd, -) && printf 'org.gradle.java.installations.paths=%s
org.gradle.java.installations.auto-download=false
org.gradle.configuration-cache=false
' "$JAVA_PATHS" > ~/.gradle/gradle.properties && cat ~/.gradle/gradle.properties
